title: • Special Unlockable Challenges
content:
• Special Unlockable Challenges

✔ Game Mechanics
• This document explains everything students need to know about how the RPG elements work
• Archetypes & Leveling Paths
• XP Earning & Spending Rules
• Faction & Party-Based Gameplay
• Secret Mechanics (some hidden, some revealed later)
• Major Events & Power Shake-Ups

✔ Scribes & Narrative Manipulation
• Outlines the Scribe Role and How Class History Is Written & Rewritten
• Log of edits made by scribes (track student modifications)
• Professor veto tracker & intervention records

✔ Items, Curses & Power-Ups
• Weekly Item & Artifact List
• Tracking who has what
• Curse Spawns & Transfer Mechanics
• Secret & Hidden Perks & Unlockables
• Legendary Items & Their Rules

✔ Secret/Hidden Systems (Instructor Only)
